title: Add denial tracking module (parity with CC denialTracking.ts — consecutive/total denial limits)
description:
## Summary

CC's `utils/permissions/denialTracking.ts` tracks permission classifier denials with two counters:
- consecutiveDenials: resets to 0 on any allowed action
- totalDenials: never resets (session-scoped)

Thresholds (DENIAL_LIMITS): maxConsecutive=3, maxTotal=20.
When shouldFallbackToPrompting() returns true:
- Interactive mode: fall back to permission prompt with warning
- Headless mode: throw AbortError('Agent aborted: too many classifier denials in headless mode')

OC has no DenialTrackingState, recordDenial, recordSuccess, or shouldFallbackToPrompting.

## Security relevance
Without denial tracking, a headless OC agent can be stuck in an infinite denial loop. CC aborts the agent after 20 total denials in headless mode. This gap is security-relevant for agent reliability.

## Behaviors to implement
- DenialTrackingState { consecutiveDenials, totalDenials }
- recordDenial: increments both counters
- recordSuccess: resets consecutiveDenials to 0 only (totalDenials persists)
- shouldFallbackToPrompting: true when consecutive >= 3 OR total >= 20
- Integration with PermissionManager::check() for headless vs. interactive behavior

## Parent issue
#531

## References
- CC: utils/permissions/denialTracking.ts:1-46
- CC: utils/permissions/permissions.ts:879-911, 958-978, 984-1058
- OC: src/permissions.rs (no denial tracking)
